prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约27228名→29581名→38794名→35898名→36510名。2023年出现明显后移（较2022年下降约9200名），2024年有所回升，2025年基本持平于36510名附近，近两年位次趋于稳定在36000名上下；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年140人，2022年146人，2023年146人，2024年155人，2025年155人，2026年（招生计划文件）仍为155人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第84名（2025年第83名），排名近年稳定在80–85名区间，属于中上水平211高校。学校以电力能源为特色，行业认可度高；该校在2026年声誉评价文件中未出现，抖音热度总排名中亦未进入前106名，整体舆情平稳，无明显正面或负面事件冲击报考心理；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为该校王牌学科。电气工程及其自动化专业在山东省历年录取位次稳定在10000–11000名区间，是全校录取门槛最高的专业，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业在2024年专业热度分析中被评为"高热推荐"，2023年亦为"推荐"（66.47），社会关注度持续高位。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。省控线方面，山东省普通类一段线2021–2025年分别为444、437、443、444、441分，波动幅度较小，未出现剧烈变化；该校位于河北省保定市，非山东省本地高校，但在山东招生规模较大（155人），属于该校在省外的重要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年趋于稳定（约36500名）、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生规模明显增加（+5.7%）、电气王牌专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，最低录取位次在2025年36510名基础上小幅上移。预测2026年最低录取位次约36540名，区间36040–37040名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（36040–37040名）内，建议以二档专业为主力报考目标，一档专业（电气、计算机、电子信息类）作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如36000名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如37000名附近）应以二档为主、三档保底。电气工程及其自动化作为该校A级王牌专业，历年录取位次约10000–11000名，远高于校线，需结合自身位次理性评估。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong comprehensive category were approximately 27228 → 29581 → 38794 → 35898 → 36510. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (about 9200 places lower than 2022), with a rebound in 2024 and basically stable around 36510 in 2025. In recent two years, the rankings have stabilized around 36000. The enrollment plan in Shandong comprehensive category: 140 in 2021, 146 in 2022, 146 in 2023, 155 in 2024, 155 in 2025, and still 155 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents). The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, providing no direct relief to the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 84th (83rd in 2025), with rankings stable in the 80–85 range in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper level 211 university. The university is characterized by electric power and energy, with high industry recognition. In the 2026 reputation evaluation documents, it did not appear, and in the overall Douyin popularity rankings, it did not enter the top 106. Overall public opinion is stable, with no significant positive or negative events impacting application psychology. There is no signal of a cutoff drop in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both being flagship disciplines. The Electrical Engineering and Automation major has stable admission rankings in Shandong in the 10000–11000 range in recent years, being the most difficult major to enter, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, and also 'recommended' (66.47) in 2023, with sustained high social attention. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Gaokao is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from about 681,000 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying overall competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Shandong general first segment line from 2021 to 2025 was 444, 437, 443, 444, and 441 points respectively, with small fluctuations and no drastic changes. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not a local university in Shandong, but has a large enrollment scale in Shandong (155 people), making it one of the important sources of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable historical rankings in recent two years (about 36500), unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, significant increase in Shandong candidate numbers (+5.7%), and sustained high popularity of the electrical flagship major, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026, with the minimum admission ranking slightly rising from 36510 in 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 36540, with a range of 36040–37040.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (36040–37040), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 36000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 37000), you should mainly target Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as backup. Electrical Engineering and Automation, as the university's A-level flagship major, has historical admission rankings around 10000–11000, far above the university cutoff, so you need to rationally assess based on your own ranking.
